Our Philosophy

Where Precision
Meets Beauty

At Fatmir Dent, we believe exceptional dental care is both a science and an art. Our clinic in Tetovo combines state-of-the-art technology with refined aesthetics to deliver treatments that transform not only smiles, but lives.

Every procedure is crafted with meticulous attention — from the first consultation to the final reveal. Our team of specialists brings global expertise to North Macedonia, giving our patients access to world-class stomatology at its finest.

19+
Years Experience
3K+
Happy Patients
98%
Satisfaction Rate

What We Offer

Our Specialisations

01

Porcelain Veneers

Ultra-thin, custom-crafted shells that reshape and perfect your smile. Correcting chips, stains, gaps and misalignment in a single aesthetic transformation.

Discover
02

Teeth Whitening

Professional-grade bleaching systems delivering dramatic results. Lift deep stains and restore natural brilliance in a single clinical session.

Discover
03

Dental Braces

Traditional and ceramic bracket systems for precise orthodontic correction. Meticulously planned treatment for lasting, functional alignment.

Discover
04

Invisalign

Discreet clear aligner therapy for the modern professional. Straighten teeth without visible hardware — removable, comfortable, precise.

Discover
05

Dental Implants

Titanium-root permanent tooth replacement that looks, feels and functions naturally. The gold standard in restorative dentistry — built to last a lifetime.

Discover
06

Teeth Bonding

Composite resin artistry that repairs chips, reshapes teeth and closes gaps. A conservative, single-visit solution with beautiful, immediate results.

Discover
07

Emax Veneers

Lithium disilicate glass-ceramic veneers prized for their exceptional light transmission and lifelike translucency. Indistinguishable from natural enamel — the pinnacle of cosmetic artistry.

Discover
08

Zircon Veneers

Zirconia-based veneers offering superior strength alongside a natural, luminous finish. Ideal for patients seeking long-lasting durability without compromising aesthetics.

Discover
09

Metal Ceramic Crown

A time-proven restorative crown combining a durable metal substructure with a lifelike ceramic exterior. Reliable strength for posterior teeth with a natural, seamless appearance.

Discover

Dentist in Tetovo

Modern Dental Care for
Tetovo Smiles

Fatmir Dent helps patients in Tetovo and the surrounding Polog region improve their smiles with aesthetic, restorative and preventive dental treatments. From natural-looking veneers and professional teeth whitening to braces, Invisalign, dental implants, bonding and crowns, every treatment plan is designed around comfort, precision and long-term results.

Patients can book appointments online, call the clinic directly, or request treatment information through WhatsApp. The clinic is located at 29 November, Tetovo 1220, North Macedonia.

Our Clinic

A Space Designed
for Excellence

Where comfort meets precision — our clinic environment reflects the care we bring to every treatment.

Questions

Dental Clinic FAQ

Helpful answers for patients looking for a dentist in Tetovo.

Where is Fatmir Dent located?

Fatmir Dent is located at 29 November, Tetovo 1220, North Macedonia.

How do I book an appointment?

You can book through the website appointment form or call the clinic directly at +389 70 652 698.

What services does the clinic offer?

The clinic offers porcelain veneers, teeth whitening, braces, Invisalign, dental implants, composite bonding, Emax veneers, zircon veneers and metal ceramic crowns.

What are the working hours?

Fatmir Dent is open Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 16:00. The clinic is closed on Saturday and Sunday.

Do you offer cosmetic dentistry?

Yes. Cosmetic treatments include veneers, whitening, composite bonding and smile design options for natural-looking results.

Can I request a consultation first?

Yes. New patients can request a consultation to discuss treatment options before choosing a dental procedure.
